en.eNote: No meals logged for Jun 22–28 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 516 kcal/day, peaking 1,114 on Friday's swim block. Sunday (Jun 28) just starting.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −930 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Sunday (Jun 28) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Friday's swim block was the week's peak
en.i1: Friday stacked a 2.1 km pool set (avg 131 / max 158, the week's hardest swim) with an 873 m open-water swim — 3h36 combined and 1,511 active kcal, more than any other day this week.
en.i2: Two structured pool swims (Mon 2.2 km, Fri 2.1 km) plus Friday's 873 m open-water swim — about 5.2 km in the water, the backbone of the week's load.
en.i3t: Three lifts, this week's tonnage still pending
en.i3: Strength on Tue (hack squat), Thu and Sat ran avg HR 114 / 113 / 108, maxes 142 / 154 / 147. Hevy hasn't synced this week's sessions, so lifted volume isn't in yet — but last Saturday's trap-bar deadlift did land: 3×150 kg on the top sets, HR peaking to 148.
en.i4: After RHR drifted up midweek (peaking 58 on Thu) and overnight HRV bottomed at 31 on Sat, this morning flipped: HRV back to 43, RHR down to 53, stress 16. The body absorbed the load — keep Sunday light to bank it.
en.rec: A steadier, swim-led week: two structured pool sessions (2.2 + 2.1 km) and an 873 m open-water swim, three strength days (hack squat Tue, Thu, Sat), with Wednesday the only full rest day. Active burn totalled 3,613 kcal across the seven days — lighter than last week now that the big hike has rolled off the window. Recovery dipped midweek (RHR to 58, HRV to 31 on Sat) then rebounded this morning (HRV 43, RHR 53). Sunday is rest/light per plan — a Z2 swim or short hike at most, then protect sleep before the next block. This week's Hevy lifts haven't synced yet (tonnage pending); last Saturday's trap-bar deadlift is now charted (top sets 3×150 kg). No meals logged after Jun 14, so intake shows the assumed 2,000 plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-22 → 2026-06-28 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 3 treninga snage · Hevy volumen u tijeku
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 22.–28.6. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 516 kcal/dan, vrhunac 1.114 na petkovom plivanju. Nedjelja (28.6.) tek počinje.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −930 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Nedjelja (28.6.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Petkovo plivanje bilo je vrhunac tjedna
hr.i1: Petak je spojio bazenskih 2,1 km (prosj. 131 / maks 158, najteže plivanje tjedna) s plivanjem na otvorenom 873 m — ukupno 3h36 i 1.511 aktivnih kcal, više nego ijedan drugi dan.
hr.i2: Dva strukturirana bazenska treninga (pon 2,2 km, pet 2,1 km) plus petkovih 873 m na otvorenom — oko 5,2 km u vodi, okosnica tjednog opterećenja.
hr.i3t: Tri dizanja, tonaža ovog tjedna još čeka
hr.i3: Snaga u uto (hack squat), čet i sub: prosj. puls 114 / 113 / 108, maks 142 / 154 / 147. Hevy nije sinkronizirao treninge ovog tjedna, pa volumen još nije unesen — ali prošlosubotnja trap-bar mrtva dizanja jesu stigla: 3×150 kg na vršnim serijama, puls do 148.
hr.i4: Nakon što je RHR porastao sredinom tjedna (vrhunac 58 u čet) i noćni HRV pao na 31 u sub, jutros se okrenulo: HRV natrag na 43, RHR na 53, stres 16. Tijelo je apsorbiralo opterećenje — neka nedjelja bude lagana.
hr.rec: Mirniji tjedan u znaku plivanja: dva strukturirana bazenska treninga (2,2 + 2,1 km) i plivanje na otvorenom 873 m, tri dana snage (hack squat uto, čet, sub), uz srijedu kao jedini potpuni odmor. Aktivna potrošnja ukupno 3.613 kcal kroz sedam dana — lakše nego prošli tjedan sad kad je veliko planinarenje ispalo iz prozora. Oporavak je pao sredinom tjedna (RHR na 58, HRV na 31 u sub) pa odskočio jutros (HRV 43, RHR 53). Nedjelja je odmor/lagano po planu — najviše Z2 plivanje ili kratko planinarenje, pa čuvaj san prije sljedećeg bloka. Dizanja ovog tjedna nisu sinkronizirana (tonaža čeka); prošlosubotnja trap-bar mrtva dizanja sad su na grafu (vršne serije 3×150 kg). Nema zabilježenih obroka nakon 14.6., pa unos prikazuje pretpostavljenih 2.000.
